headlines.headline: Urvel Grid sees mixed results in supply chain optimization pilot program

sentiment.reasoning: Mixed results from a pilot program indicate uncertainty regarding the scalability and effectiveness of the supply chain optimization efforts.

headlines.headline: Kelvos Resources sees 7% margin improvement in latest quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 7% margin improvement is a concrete positive indicator of operational efficiency and profitability growth.

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational event that typically has negligible impact on financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
